description: Input schema for one Long-Horizon Promptfoo test case.

required_fields.vars.stage: SDLC stage, such as Formal Requirement, Use Case, Architecture Design, Implementation, or Validation.
required_fields.vars.required_id: Identifier that must be preserved in the candidate artifact.
required_fields.vars.requirement_context: Original user brief or requirement context.
required_fields.vars.prior_artifact: Previous-stage artifact used as workflow context.
required_fields.vars.claude_baseline: Accepted production Claude artifact for this stage.
required_fields.vars.candidate_artifact: Artifact generated by the replacement model and harness.

notes: Keep each case tied to exactly one SDLC stage.
Use the same case set when comparing different model+harness stacks.
